chunks.text: HKN holds town hall to address department concerns - EECS at Berkeley EECS honor society Eta Kappa Nu (HKN) hosted a town hall on Wednesday, Sept. 14, 2016, to discuss concerns created by long waitlists for some EECS classes. The town hall was attended by EECS Chair Jitendra Malik , CS Chair James Demmel , and EE Chair Jan Rabaey , as well as a variety of faculty, staff, and students in the department. The meeting was prompted by a dramatic increase in the number of undergraduates taking computer science classes over the past three years which resulted in waitlists of around 2,600 students at the beginning of this semester. Although generous private donations, which were applied to short term funding for additional GSIs, helped alleviate the worst of the problem by the third week of classes, a longer-term strategy needs to be devised. Categories Education Students View Open Faculty Positions
